chain.thought: Explanation: Goals 6 and 7 were both scored on 2012-2-29 at the same venue against Canada. Since they occur consecutively and share the same venue, Marcos Pizzelli scored consecutive goals at Tsirion Stadium, Limassol, Cyprus.
